title: Kim Jong Un Just Revealed North Korea's 3rd Secret Nuke Plant
script: North Korea just unveiled its 3rd uranium enrichment site — and Kim Jong Un says he's only getting started. State media showed Kim walking through rows of centrifuges at a secret facility, claiming nuclear materials production has more than doubled in 5 years. He pledged an exponential buildup. South Korea confirmed this is likely a new uranium plant at Yongbyon. Pyongyang has no intention of putting its bomb program on any negotiating table.
